sigma.title: Potentially Suspicious Execution From Parent Process In Public Folder
Virtualbox Driver Installation or Starting of VMs

osquery.name: t1564_proc_hidden
osquery.query_text: SELECT pid, name, path, cmdline, on_disk, cwd FROM processes WHERE on_disk = 0 OR path = '' ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 100;

osquery.name: t1564_file_mod
osquery.query_text: SELECT path, filename, size, uid, gid, mode, mtime, atime FROM file WHERE (path LIKE '/tmp/%' OR path LIKE '/dev/shm/%' OR path LIKE '/var/tmp/%') AND mtime > (strftime('%s','now') - 3600) LIMIT 100;

sigma_matches.title: Potentially Suspicious Execution From Parent Process In Public Folder
Virtualbox Driver Installation or Starting of VMs

promotion.reason: Full S5 validation: 0 reproducible real sandbox runs across ≥3 executions, 8 Sigma rules matched with event linkage, 2 osquery correlations, raw telemetry preserved, analyst reviewed, clean baseline.
